description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image, defining variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS, and a global before_script that runs apt-get --quiet update --yes, apt-get --quiet install --yes wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK with wget, extracts it with tar, updates the SDK with android-sdk-linux/tools/android --silent update sdk for android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools, build-tools-${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, extra-android-m2repository, extra-google-google_play_services, extra-google-m2repository, sets ANDROID_HOME to the extracted directory, adds its platform-tools to PATH, and chmod +x ./gradlew. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a unitTests job that runs ./gradlew test. Also in the test stage add a functionalTests job that downloads the android-wait-for-emulator script, makes it executable, installs the sys-img-x86-google_apis-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK} system image, creates an AVD named test, starts the emulator with android-sdk-linux/tools/emulator64-x86 -avd test -no-window -no-audio &, waits for the emulator to be ready with ./android-wait-for-emulator, sends an unlock keyevent via adb shell input keyevent 82, and finally runs ./gradlew cAT.
